title: Hydranthelium humifusum
taxonomy: Hydranthelium humifusum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Hydranthelium, which is a group of grasses. Within the Poaceae family, it is further classified as a monocotyledonous plant, having one seed leaf in its seeds. The classification of Hydranthelium humifusum is also supported by its characteristic leaf and stem morphology. As a grass species, it is likely to be found in a variety of habitats, including grasslands and meadows.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
